elements.title: Keely Hodgkinson
elements.contents: ... that Keely Hodgkinson (pictured) broke an athletics world record that had been set on the day that she was born?

elements.title: It Makes No Difference Now
elements.contents: ... that the writer of "It Makes No Difference Now" sold the song for $300 before it became a hit that was covered by Ray Charles, the Supremes, and Merle Haggard?

elements.title: South Hampstead Synagogue
elements.contents: ... that South Hampstead Synagogue has been described as a "model of elegant simplicity in wood, glass and stone"?

elements.title: Sundae Girl
elements.contents: ... that Sundae Girl is a children's novel that deals with dementia and alcoholism?

elements.title: flatbread
elements.contents: ... that some communities bake flatbread by covering it in sand?

elements.title: an Arizona TV station
elements.contents: ... that an Arizona TV station running a marathon of Star Trek caused a buying frenzy of blank videotapes in the local area?

elements.title: Amy Hart
elements.contents: ... that Amy Hart left her job as a cabin crew manager to appear on Love Island?

elements.title: Gaming Historian
elements.contents: ... that, when it came time to close Gaming Historian, its creator released a swath of court documents from Universal City Studios, Inc. v. Nintendo Co., Ltd.?

elements.title: Julian Granberry
elements.contents: ... that linguist Julian Granberry also hunted ghosts?
